title: Pt. 2 Decision Making: 101 #shorts
description:
#shorts 
Makings Better Decisions | Part 2: The YES/NO rule! When you say YES to one thing, you are saying NO to another. ✨
Example: “If I say YES to going to that party, what am I saying NO to?” (Probably quality sleep and consequently physical & mental efficiency the next day)❇️ 

Listen to what your mind tells you and then decide if the decision you made is worth it. ✨
.
.
.
#mentalmodel #perspective #decisionmaking #selfgrowth #mentalgrowth #decisionmaking #decisionfatigue
